creator: dweimer@dweimer.net
text:
full make.conf:

CFLAGS?= -O
CLFAGS+= -pipe
COPTFLAGS?= -O
COPTFLAGS+= -pipe
NO_CPU_CFLAGS=

# Poudreiere Specific Options
WITH_CCACHE_BUILD= YES
CCACHE_DIR=/root/.ccache
WITH_MPM=event
WITH_PKGNG= YES
DISABLE_LICENSES=yes

OPTIONS_SET= LIBEDIT OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS GSSAPI_NONE PYTHON MAKE_JOBS THREADS OPENMP
OPTIONS_UNSET= X11 X GUI TLS_SRP AVAHI GSSAPI_BASE XPM CUPS EXAMPLES DOCS GTKDOC DTRACE INFO BOOTSTRAP LIQ JIT STATIC LTO LLVM TEST

DEFAULT_VERSIONS= pgsql=15 perl5=5.36 python=3.11 python3=3.11 ssl=openssl linux=c7

Bacula Options:
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for bacula13-client-13.0.1
_OPTIONS_READ=bacula13-client-13.0.1
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=IPV6 NLS PYTHON
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IPV6
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=NLS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=PYTHON

Trying to figure out how to force Poudriere to rebuild all the ports to see if somethign strange is out of sync with the OpenSSL switch to 3.0.
